name: addEntrant
_note: tournaments.addEntrant registers a solo entrant or team into a tournament owned by the caller. Unknown id (or another user's id) → 'tournament_not_found' (per-user isolated). Registration only while status 'upcoming' and not locked, else 'registration_closed'; full bracket → 'tournament_full'; empty name → 'name_required'; team mode with no roster → 'roster_required'. New entrants get a sequential seed; rating is clamped [0,5000]. No money moves.
